_schema.round: id, date (ISO), course, organizer, teeTimes[], played, notes?, results[]
_schema.result: playerId, name, attended (bool), holesPlayed (9|18|null), gross (int|null), handicap (int|null), pars, birdies, eagles, albatrosses, holeInOnes. Net is derived = gross - handicap.
_schema.scoring: Points per round = (attended?5:0) + pars*1 + birdies*3 + eagles*10 + albatrosses*20 + holeInOnes*25 + (lowRound?3:0). Pars/birdies/etc. are RAW achievements — handicap does not adjust them. Low Round: lowest NET (gross - handicap) among players with holesPlayed=18 and handicap set. Ties on low round: each tied player gets 3 (not split).
_schema.terminology: Golf rounds use 'organizer'. Poker events use 'host'.
_schema.standings: Computed client-side: highest cumulative points wins.

attendance.label: Attendance
attendance.description: Showing up and playing at least 9 holes of an MMP event

par.label: Par
par.description: Even strokes with the alotted strokes for the hole

birdie.label: Birdie
birdie.description: 1 stroke under the alotted strokes for the hole

eagle.label: Eagle
eagle.description: 2 strokes under the alotted strokes for the hole

albatross.label: Albatross
albatross.description: 3 strokes under the alotted strokes for the hole

lowRound.label: Low Round
lowRound.description: Lowest net score (gross − handicap) for the 18-hole session

penalty.label: Over handicap par
penalty.description: Score over (par + handicap): 6–10 over → −1 pt; 11–15 → −2 pts; 16+ → −3 pts. 9-hole rounds use par 36 and handicap/2.
